blocks.text: Glimt stun Inter — PSG and Real Madrid face the knife-edge tonight
Glimt's 2-1 win at San Siro is the stuff of Norwegian football legend. Tonight, two more CL ties hang wide open: Monaco trail PSG by one goal, Benfica right on Madrid's heels.
⚽ Sat 16:00 — West Ham at Liverpool, Anfield title race showdown
⚽ Sat 16:15 — Villarreal at Barcelona, La Liga title crunch at Camp Nou
